member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.AdbSharpException
member.summary: Base exception for AdbSharp failures.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.AdbSharpException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.AdbSharpException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The failure message.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.AdbSharpException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The failure message.
The underlying failure.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.DeviceConnectionException
member.summary: Represents a device connection failure.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.DeviceConnectionException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The connection failure message.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.DeviceConnectionException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The connection failure message.
The underlying failure.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice
member.summary: Represents a detected Android device and the host transport descriptor needed to connect to it.
member.param: The device identity.
The detected communication mode.
The capabilities discovered so far.
The USB descriptor selected for device communication.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice.#ctor(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity,AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode,AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities,AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor)
member.summary: Represents a detected Android device and the host transport descriptor needed to connect to it.
member.param: The device identity.
The detected communication mode.
The capabilities discovered so far.
The USB descriptor selected for device communication.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice.Identity
member.summary: The device identity.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice.Mode
member.summary: The detected communication mode.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice.Capabilities
member.summary: The capabilities discovered so far.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice.Usb
member.summary: The USB descriptor selected for device communication.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities
member.summary: Feature flags discovered from ADB or Fastboot capability probes.
member.param: Indicates whether ADB services are available.
Indicates whether Fastboot commands are available.
Indicates whether userspace Fastboot commands are available.
Indicates whether the ADB file sync service is available.
Indicates whether shell v2 features are advertised.
Indicates whether ADB stream TLS is advertised.
Indicates whether logical partition operations are supported.
Indicates whether logical partition commands are supported.
Indicates whether snapshot update commands are supported.
Indicates whether Virtual A/B update behavior is detected.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Feature flags discovered from ADB or Fastboot capability probes.
member.param: Indicates whether ADB services are available.
Indicates whether Fastboot commands are available.
Indicates whether userspace Fastboot commands are available.
Indicates whether the ADB file sync service is available.
Indicates whether shell v2 features are advertised.
Indicates whether ADB stream TLS is advertised.
Indicates whether logical partition operations are supported.
Indicates whether logical partition commands are supported.
Indicates whether snapshot update commands are supported.
Indicates whether Virtual A/B update behavior is detected.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsAdb
member.summary: Indicates whether ADB services are available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsFastboot
member.summary: Indicates whether Fastboot commands are available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsFastbootd
member.summary: Indicates whether userspace Fastboot commands are available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsFileSync
member.summary: Indicates whether the ADB file sync service is available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsShellV2
member.summary: Indicates whether shell v2 features are advertised.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsTls
member.summary: Indicates whether ADB stream TLS is advertised.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsDynamicPartitions
member.summary: Indicates whether logical partition operations are supported.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsLogicalPartitions
member.summary: Indicates whether logical partition commands are supported.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsSnapshotUpdates
member.summary: Indicates whether snapshot update commands are supported.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.SupportsVirtualAb
member.summary: Indicates whether Virtual A/B update behavior is detected.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceCapabilities.Empty
member.summary: Gets an empty capability set.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity
member.summary: Stable descriptive identity for an Android device.
member.param: The device serial number when reported by the transport.
The USB manufacturer string when available.
The USB product string when available.
The Android model name when known.
A host-local stable transport identifier.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Stable descriptive identity for an Android device.
member.param: The device serial number when reported by the transport.
The USB manufacturer string when available.
The USB product string when available.
The Android model name when known.
A host-local stable transport identifier.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity.SerialNumber
member.summary: The device serial number when reported by the transport.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity.Manufacturer
member.summary: The USB manufacturer string when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity.Product
member.summary: The USB product string when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity.Model
member.summary: The Android model name when known.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceIdentity.TransportId
member.summary: A host-local stable transport identifier.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode
member.summary: Describes the Android communication mode exposed by a connected device.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode.Unknown
member.summary: The device mode is unknown.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode.Adb
member.summary: The device exposes the Android Debug Bridge protocol.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode.Recovery
member.summary: The device exposes ADB while in recovery.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode.Bootloader
member.summary: The device is in the bootloader.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode.Fastboot
member.summary: The device exposes bootloader Fastboot.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode.Fastbootd
member.summary: The device exposes userspace Fastboot.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.DeviceMode.Sideload
member.summary: The device exposes ADB sideload.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor
member.summary: Transport-neutral USB metadata for an Android interface.
member.param: A host-local identifier that can be passed back to a transport factory.
The USB vendor identifier.
The USB product identifier.
The interface number selected for protocol I/O.
The USB interface class.
The USB interface subclass.
The USB interface protocol.
The USB serial number when available.
The manufacturer string when available.
The product string when available.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.#ctor(System.String,System.UInt16,System.UInt16,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Transport-neutral USB metadata for an Android interface.
member.param: A host-local identifier that can be passed back to a transport factory.
The USB vendor identifier.
The USB product identifier.
The interface number selected for protocol I/O.
The USB interface class.
The USB interface subclass.
The USB interface protocol.
The USB serial number when available.
The manufacturer string when available.
The product string when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.TransportId
member.summary: A host-local identifier that can be passed back to a transport factory.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.VendorId
member.summary: The USB vendor identifier.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.ProductId
member.summary: The USB product identifier.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.InterfaceNumber
member.summary: The interface number selected for protocol I/O.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.InterfaceClass
member.summary: The USB interface class.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.InterfaceSubClass
member.summary: The USB interface subclass.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.InterfaceProtocol
member.summary: The USB interface protocol.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.SerialNumber
member.summary: The USB serial number when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.Manufacturer
member.summary: The manufacturer string when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor.Product
member.summary: The product string when available.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferDirection
member.summary: Describes transfer direction for progress notifications.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferDirection.Upload
member.summary: Data is being sent to the device.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferDirection.Download
member.summary: Data is being read from the device.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress
member.summary: Reports progress for a long-running USB transfer.
member.param: The transfer direction.
The number of bytes transferred so far.
The expected total length when known.
Optional contextual progress text.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress.#ctor(AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferDirection,System.Int64,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String)
member.summary: Reports progress for a long-running USB transfer.
member.param: The transfer direction.
The number of bytes transferred so far.
The expected total length when known.
Optional contextual progress text.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress.Direction
member.summary: The transfer direction.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress.BytesTransferred
member.summary: The number of bytes transferred so far.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress.TotalBytes
member.summary: The expected total length when known.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress.Message
member.summary: Optional contextual progress text.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Common.ProtocolException
member.summary: Represents malformed protocol data or an unexpected protocol transition.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.ProtocolException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The protocol failure message.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Common.ProtocolException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The protocol failure message.
The underlying failure.
